name: template-doc-request
description: Retrieve email composing guidelines for pre-meeting document/materials requests. Returns structured policy (required elements, tone, structure, constraints, example) that you use as instructions when composing the email — do NOT send the policy itself to the recipient. Supports 'generate', 'save', and 'reset' actions.

inputs.sender_name: string? (required for generate — the person requesting the documents)
inputs.meeting_subject: string? (required for generate — the meeting topic)
inputs.meeting_time: string? (required for generate — when the meeting is scheduled)
inputs.documents_requested: string? (required for generate — comma-separated list of requested materials)
inputs.deadline: string? (optional for generate — when materials are needed by)
inputs.custom_policy: string? (required for save — the policy to store)
